error.times_not_chronological: Start times must be in chronological order: Morning < Afternoon < Evening < Night. Check both workday and non-workday times.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Already configured. Only a single instance is allowed.

user.title: Time of Day
user.description: Configure time-of-day periods with workday awareness and pre-activation support.

data_description.workday_entity: Binary sensor that indicates whether today is a workday.
data_description.morning_preactivation_window: Minutes before the start time during which the pre-activation entity can trigger early activation (0 to disable).
data_description.morning_preactivation_entity: Boolean entity that triggers early activation of Morning when it turns on during the pre-activation window.
data_description.afternoon_preactivation_window: Minutes before the start time during which the pre-activation entity can trigger early activation (0 to disable).
data_description.afternoon_preactivation_entity: Boolean entity that triggers early activation of Afternoon when it turns on during the pre-activation window.
data_description.evening_preactivation_window: Minutes before the start time during which the pre-activation entity can trigger early activation (0 to disable).
data_description.evening_preactivation_entity: Boolean entity that triggers early activation of Evening when it turns on during the pre-activation window.
data_description.night_preactivation_window: Minutes before the start time during which the pre-activation entity can trigger early activation (0 to disable).
data_description.night_preactivation_entity: Boolean entity that triggers early activation of Night when it turns on during the pre-activation window.

advance_period.name: Advance Period
advance_period.description: Advance to the next time-of-day period immediately.
